description_long: This is a dark, bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body tapering to a narrow neck and flared rim. The surface is finished with a glossy glaze, giving it a reflective sheen. Vertical ribbed lines encircle the upper body, adding texture and visual interest. Around the lower midsection, a band of subtle, low-relief animal motifs—possibly horses or similar creatures—runs continuously, providing a decorative accent. The coloration is predominantly deep brown to black, with lighter highlights accentuating the ribbing and relief work. The interior appears unglazed or only lightly finished, suggesting a traditional hand-crafted technique.
description: A glossy, dark ceramic vase with vertical ribbing and a decorative band of animal motifs around its midsection. The form is rounded with a narrow neck and flared rim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's flared rim, pronounced ribbing, and the clearest section of the animal motif band.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the curvature of the body and a different segment of the animal motif, with the ribbing catching more light.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the vase's rounded profile and the continuity of the ribbed texture and motif band.
description_view_3: This view shows the vase's ribbing and motif band in shadow, with less detail visible in the decorative elements.
attribute_pattern: vertical ribbed lines with animal motif band
